author: y4rr
content: Phase 5 (#1002) landed Conv2d::new_full with CPU-only support for groups/dilation, gating the GPU dispatch on groups==1 && dilation==(1,1). Phase 6 task: extend ferrotorch-gpu/src/conv.rs gpu_conv2d_f32 signature to accept groups: usize and dilation: (usize, usize), wire through ferrotorch-core::gpu_dispatch::GpuBackend::conv2d_f32, then remove the explicit gate in ferrotorch-nn/src/conv.rs Conv2d::forward (the 'gpu_eligible' guard). Probe-before-fix: a CUDA test asserting Conv2d::new_full(...,(2,2),2,...) on a CUDA tensor produces correct output without the CPU detour. CHANGELOG note in #1002 says this is tracked here.
